data.name: Creamy Coffee
data.detailed_description:
You thought running a café would be simple — the smell of roasted beans, the soft hum of morning conversations, the comfort of routine. But some mornings bring more than just the dawn. Shadows creep into your world, reality begins to blur.

Someone — or something — is watching.

Project Coffee is a sandbox game where you manage a cozy little shop while unraveling a sinister mystery.

You can expect:

  • Three romanceable love-interests

  • Collectibles and mini-games that unlock new scenes

  • Switch between animated or still CGs for core spicy scenes

  • Explore the town and get to know more about the people living there

  • Translations for multiple languages

  • A full replay gallery where you can unlock and replay all unlocked scenes

  • Day & Night Cycle mechanic

  • And much, much more.
data.about_the_game:
You thought running a café would be simple — the smell of roasted beans, the soft hum of morning conversations, the comfort of routine. But some mornings bring more than just the dawn. Shadows creep into your world, reality begins to blur.

  • Three romanceable love-interests

  • Switch between animated or still CGs for core spicy scenes

  • Explore the town and get to know more about the people living there

  • A full replay gallery where you can unlock and replay all unlocked scenes

  • Day & Night Cycle mechanic

  • And much, much more.
data.short_description: In this sandbox visual novel, you open a cozy café, expecting peaceful days of brewing coffee. But your alluring succubi have an appetite beyond lattes and pastries. As reality blurs and shadows creep in, something watches from the dark. Unravel the secrets before it’s too late.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel Pentium 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11+
  • 處理器: intel or Apple M processor series
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 13+
  • 處理器: intel or Apple M processor series
  • 記憶體: 4096 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 4096 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04+ (or glibc 2.17+, Debian, Arch, Fedora)
  • 處理器: 64 bit x86_64 CPU (Intel vagy AMD)
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間
